code.description: One of a server-defined set of error codes.

message.description: A human-readable representation of the error.

details.description: An array of details about specific errors that led to this reported error.

innererror.description: An object containing more specific information than the current object about the error.

Azure.Core.Foundations.InnerError.description: An object containing more specific information about the error. As per Azure REST API guidelines - https://aka.ms/AzureRestApiGuidelines#handling-errors.

code.description: One of a server-defined set of error codes.

values.name: Canceled
values.description: The operation has been canceled by the user.

Azure.Core.eTag.description:
The ETag (or entity tag) HTTP response header is an identifier for a specific version of a resource.
It lets caches be more efficient and save bandwidth, as a web server does not need to resend a full response if the content was not changed.

It is a string of ASCII characters placed between double quotes, like "675af34563dc-tr34".

title.description: A brief summary of the error.

name.description: The name of the parameter that resulted in the error.

detail.description: A detailed description of the error.

status.description: The HTTP status code that the error maps to.

bytePos.description: The byte offset within the value where the validation error occurs.

instanceLocation.description: The location of the property that resulted in the validation error.

keywordLocation.description: The location in the schema that the property violates.

Key.description: Keys serve as identifiers for key-values and are used to store and retrieve corresponding values.

KeyLabelScope.description: A schema scope that targets key-values matching both a key pattern and a label pattern.

key.description: The key pattern for the schema scope.

label.description: The label pattern for the schema scope. A null or absent label targets key-values with the null label.

KeyListResult.description: The result of a list request.

@nextLink.description: The URI that can be used to request the next set of paged results.

KeyScope.description: A schema scope that targets key-values matching a key pattern.

key.description: The key pattern for the schema scope.

KeyValue.description: A key-value pair representing application settings.

label.description: The label the key-value belongs to.

content_type.description: The content type of the value stored within the key-value.

last_modified.description: A date representing the last time the key-value was modified.

locked.description: Indicates whether the key-value is locked.

etag.description: A value representing the current state of the resource.

KeyValueFilter.description:
Enables filtering of key-values. Syntax reference:
https://aka.ms/azconfig/docs/restapisnapshots

key.description: Filters key-values by their key field.

label.description: Filters key-values by their label field.

tags.description: Filters key-values by their tags field.

KeyValueListResult.description: The result of a list request.

etag.description: An identifier representing the returned state of the resource.

@nextLink.description: The URI that can be used to request the next set of paged results.

Label.description: Labels are used to group key-values.

LabelListResult.description: The result of a list request.

@nextLink.description: The URI that can be used to request the next set of paged results.

OperationDetails.description: Details of a long running operation.

id.description: The unique id of the operation.

status.description: The current status of the operation

error.description:
An error, available when the status is `Failed`, describing why the operation
failed.

Schema.description: A schema resource used for write-time validation of key-values.

id.description: The unique identifier of the schema.

target.description: The target resource type for the schema. Required when a scope is present.

key_scope.description: The key scope of the schema. Mutually exclusive with `key_label_scope`.

key_label_scope.description: The key and label scope of the schema. Mutually exclusive with `key_scope`.

last_modified.description: A date representing the last time the schema was modified.

etag.description: The entity tag for this resource.

SchemaListResult.description: The result of a schema list request.

@nextLink.description: The URI that can be used to request the next set of paged results.

Snapshot.description: A snapshot is a named, immutable subset of an App Configuration store's key-values.

status.description: The current status of the snapshot.

filters.description: A list of filters used to filter the key-values included in the snapshot.

composition_type.description:
The composition type describes how the key-values within the snapshot are
composed. The 'key' composition type ensures there are no two key-values
containing the same key. The 'key_label' composition type ensures there are no
two key-values containing the same key and label.

created.description: The time that the snapshot was created.

expires.description: The time that the snapshot will expire.

retention_period.description:
The amount of time, in seconds, that a snapshot will remain in the archived
state before expiring. This property is only writable during the creation of a
snapshot. If not specified, the default lifetime of key-value revisions will be
used.

size.description: The size in bytes of the snapshot.

items_count.description: The amount of key-values in the snapshot.

etag.description: A value representing the current state of the snapshot.

SnapshotListResult.description: The result of a snapshot list request.

@nextLink.description: The URI that can be used to request the next set of paged results.

SnapshotUpdateParameters.description: Parameters used to update a snapshot.

status.description: The desired status of the snapshot.

Azure.Core.ClientRequestIdHeader.name: x-ms-client-request-id
